<content>1: /**
2:  * OpenClaw Agent Log Skill - Trace/Span Based Version
3:  *
4:  * 合并了:
5:  * - agentlog-auto: 自动存证 Hooks
6:  * - openclaw-agent: Trace Handoff 功能
7:  *
8:  * 使用 trace/span API 而非 sessions API：
9:  * - POST /api/traces - 创建 trace
10:  * - MCP log_turn - 创建 span
11:  * - PATCH /api/traces/:id - 更新 trace 状态
12:  *
13:  * 提供给 OpenClaw Agent 使用。
14:  */
15: 
16: import { randomUUID } from "crypto";
17: import fs from "node:fs";
18: import path from "node:path";
19: import { nanoid } from "nanoid";
20: import type { PendingTraceEntry, ActiveSessionEntry, SessionsJson } from "@agentlog/shared";
21: 
22: // ─────────────────────────────────────────────
23: // Backend Configuration
24: // ─────────────────────────────────────────────
25: 
26: const BACKEND_URL = process.env.AGENTLOG_BACKEND_URL ?? "http://localhost:7892";
27: const MCP_URL = process.env.AGENTLOG_MCP_URL ?? "http://localhost:7892";
28: 
29: // ─────────────────────────────────────────────
30: // Trace/Span Types
31: // ─────────────────────────────────────────────
32: 
33: interface Trace {
34:   id: string;
35:   parentTraceId: string | null;
36:   taskGoal: string;
37:   status: "running" | "pending_handoff" | "in_progress" | "completed" | "failed" | "paused";
38:   workspacePath: string | null;
39:   affectedFiles: string[];
40:   createdAt: string;
41:   updatedAt: string;
42:   hasCommit: boolean;
43: }
44: 
45: interface TraceHandoffResult {
46:   success: boolean;
47:   traceId?: string;
48:   sessionId?: string;
49:   error?: string;
50: }
51: 
52: interface TraceSearchResult {
53:   traceId: string;
54:   taskGoal: string;
55:   targetAgent: string;
56:   createdAt: string;
57:   score?: number;
58: }
59: 
60: // ─────────────────────────────────────────────
61: // Agent Source Detection
62: // ─────────────────────────────────────────────
63: 
64: function detectAgentSource(): string {
65:   // 从 workspace 路径推断 agent 类型
66:   // 路径格式: /home/hobo/.openclaw/agents/<agent-name>/workspace
67:   const workspacePath = process.cwd();
68:   const match = workspacePath.match(/\/agents\/([^\/]+)\/workspace/);
69:   if (match) {
70:     return `openclaw:${match[1]}`;
71:   }
72: 
73:   // Fallback: 环境变量
74:   const agentId = process.env.AGENTLOG_AGENT_ID || process.env.AGENT || "";
75:   if (agentId) {
76:     return `openclaw:${agentId}`;
77:   }
78: 
79:   return "unknown";
80: }
81: 
82: function detectAgentType(): string {
83:   const workspacePath = process.cwd();
84:   const match = workspacePath.match(/\/agents\/([^\/]+)\/workspace/);
85:   if (match) {
86:     return match[1];
87:   }
88:   return process.env.AGENTLOG_AGENT_ID || "unknown";
89: }
90: 
91: // ─────────────────────────────────────────────
92: // Auto-Logging Types
93: // ─────────────────────────────────────────────
94: 
95: interface AgentLogConfig {
96:   mcpUrl: string;
97:   autoBindCommit: boolean;
98:   reasoningCapture: boolean;
99:   toolCallCapture: boolean;
100:   sessionTimeout: number;
101: }
102: 
103: interface SessionState {
104:   traceId: string;
105:   sessionId: string;
106:   startedAt: string;
107:   reasoning: string[];
108:   toolCalls: ToolCall[];
109:   responses: Response[];
110:   model: string;
111:   agentSource: string;
112:   workspacePath: string;
113:   taskGoal: string;
114: }
115: 
116: interface ToolCall {
117:   name: string;
118:   input: Record<string, unknown>;
119:   output?: string;
120:   durationMs: number;
121:   timestamp: string;
122: }
123: 
124: interface Response {
125:   content: string;
126:   timestamp: string;
127: }
128: 
129: // ─────────────────────────────────────────────
130: // Auto-Logging State
131: // ─────────────────────────────────────────────
132: 
133: let config: AgentLogConfig = {
134:   mcpUrl: MCP_URL,
135:   autoBindCommit: true,
136:   reasoningCapture: true,
137:   toolCallCapture: true,
138:   sessionTimeout: 600,
139: };
140: 
141: let currentSession: SessionState | null = null;
142: 
143: // ─────────────────────────────────────────────
144: // sessions.json Operations (for Trace Handoff)
145: // ─────────────────────────────────────────────
146: 
147: async function getSessionsJsonPath(workspacePath: string): Promise<string> {
148:   const { execSync } = await import("child_process");
149:   const gitCommonDir = execSync(
150:     "git rev-parse --git-common-dir",
151:     { cwd: workspacePath, encoding: "utf-8" }
152:   ).trim();
153:   return path.join(gitCommonDir, "agentlog", "sessions.json");
154: }
155: 
156: function readSessionsJson(sessionsJsonPath: string): SessionsJson {
157:   if (!fs.existsSync(sessionsJsonPath)) {
158:     return { pending: {}, active: {} };
159:   }
160:   try {
161:     const content = fs.readFileSync(sessionsJsonPath, "utf-8");
162:     return JSON.parse(content) as SessionsJson;
163:   } catch {
164:     return { pending: {}, active: {} };
165:   }
166: }
167: 
168: function writeSessionsJson(sessionsJsonPath: string, data: SessionsJson): void {
169:   const dir = path.dirname(sessionsJsonPath);
170:   if (!fs.existsSync(dir)) {
171:     fs.mkdirSync(dir, { recursive: true });
172:   }
173:   const tmpPath = `${sessionsJsonPath}.tmp`;
174:   fs.writeFileSync(tmpPath, JSON.stringify(data, null, 2), "utf-8");
175:   fs.renameSync(tmpPath, sessionsJsonPath);
176: }
177: 
178: // ─────────────────────────────────────────────
179: // Backend API Request
180: // ─────────────────────────────────────────────
181: 
182: async function apiRequest<T>(
183:   method: string,
184:   endpoint: string,
185:   body?: unknown
186: ): Promise<T> {
187:   const url = `${BACKEND_URL}${endpoint}`;
188:   const options: RequestInit = {
189:     method,
190:     headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
191:     ...(body ? { body: JSON.stringify(body) } : {}),
192:   };
193: 
194:   const response = await fetch(url, options);
195:   if (!response.ok) {
196:     throw new Error(`API 错误: ${response.status} ${response.statusText}`);
197:   }
198: 
199:   return response.json() as Promise<T>;
200: }
201: 
202: // ─────────────────────────────────────────────
203: // MCP Request (for log_turn/log_intent spans)
204: // ─────────────────────────────────────────────
205: 
206: // Create span via REST API (replaces log_turn MCP call)
207: async function createSpan(traceId: string, span: {
208:   role: string;
209:   content: string;
210:   tool_name?: string;
211:   duration_ms?: number;
212:   timestamp?: string;
213: }): Promise<boolean> {
214:   try {
215:     const result = await apiRequest<{ success: boolean }>(
216:       "POST",
217: <<<<<<< HEAD
218:       `/api/traces/${traceId}/spans`,
219:       {
220: =======
221:       "/api/spans",
222:       {
223:         traceId,
224: >>>>>>> feat/agentlog-skill-daily-report
225:         actorType: span.role === "tool" ? "agent" : span.role,
226:         actorName: span.tool_name || "agent",
227:         payload: {
228:           event: span.role,
229:           content: span.content,
230:           toolName: span.tool_name,
231:           durationMs: span.duration_ms,
232:           timestamp: span.timestamp || new Date().toISOString(),
233:         },
234:       }
235:     );
236:     return result.success;
237:   } catch (error) {
238:     console.error("[openclaw-agent-log] Failed to create span:", error);
239:     return false;
240:   }
241: }
242: 
243: // Update trace status via REST API (replaces log_intent MCP call)
244: async function finalizeTrace(
245:   traceId: string,
246:   taskGoal: string,
247:   affectedFiles: string[],
248:   reasoning: string[]
249: ): Promise<boolean> {
250:   try {
251:     const result = await apiRequest<{ success: boolean }>(
252:       "PATCH",
253:       `/api/traces/${traceId}`,
254:       {
255:         status: "completed",
256:         taskGoal,
257:         affectedFiles,
258:         reasoningSummary: reasoning.join("\n\n"),
259:       }
260:     );
261:     return result.success;
262:   } catch (error) {
263:     console.error("[openclaw-agent-log] Failed to finalize trace:", error);
264:     return false;
265:   }
266: }
267: 
268: // ─────────────────────────────────────────────
269: // Trace Operations (using REST API)
270: // ─────────────────────────────────────────────
271: 
272: async function createTrace(taskGoal: string, workspacePath: string): Promise<Trace | null> {
273:   try {
274:     const result = await apiRequest<{ success: boolean; data: Trace }>(
275:       "POST",
276:       "/api/traces",
277:       { taskGoal, workspacePath }
278:     );
279:     return result.data;
280:   } catch (error) {
281:     console.error("[openclaw-agent-log] Failed to create trace:", error);
282:     return null;
283:   }
284: }
285: 
286: async function updateTraceStatus(traceId: string, status: string): Promise<boolean> {
287:   try {
288:     const result = await apiRequest<{ success: boolean }>(
289:       "PATCH",
290:       `/api/traces/${traceId}`,
291:       { status }
292:     );
293:     return result.success;
294:   } catch (error) {
295:     console.error("[openclaw-agent-log] Failed to update trace status:", error);
296:     return false;
297:   }
298: }
299: 
300: // ─────────────────────────────────────────────
301: // Session Management (Auto-Logging with Traces)
302: // ─────────────────────────────────────────────
303: 
304: async function startSession(model: string, source: string, workspacePath: string): Promise<string> {
305:   const sessionId = `sess_${Date.now()}_${randomUUID().slice(0, 8)}`;
306:   const taskGoal = `Agent session from ${source}`;
307: 
308:   // Create trace via REST API
309:   const trace = await createTrace(taskGoal, workspacePath);
310:   const traceId = trace?.id || `trace_${Date.now()}`;
311: 
312:   currentSession = {
313:     traceId,
314:     sessionId,
315:     startedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
316:     reasoning: [],
317:     toolCalls: [],
318:     responses: [],
319:     model,
320:     agentSource: source,
321:     workspacePath,
322:     taskGoal,
323:   };
324: 
325:   console.log(`[openclaw-agent-log] Session started: ${sessionId}, trace: ${traceId} (source: ${source})`);
326:   return sessionId;
327: }
328: 
329: // ─────────────────────────────────────────────
330: // OpenClaw Hooks Implementation (Auto-Logging)
331: // ─────────────────────────────────────────────
332: 
333: export async function onSessionStart(params: {
334:   sessionKey: string;
335:   model: string;
336:   workspacePath?: string;
337: }): Promise<void> {
338:   const source = detectAgentSource();
339:   const workspace = params.workspacePath || process.cwd();
340:   await startSession(params.model, source, workspace);
341:   console.log(`[openclaw-agent-log] Session started for ${params.sessionKey}`);
342: }
343: 
344: export async function beforeToolCall(params: {
345:   toolName: string;
346:   toolInput: Record<string, unknown>;
347: }): Promise<void> {
348:   if (!config.toolCallCapture) return;
349:   params.toolInput._agentlog_startTime = Date.now();
350: }
351: 
352: export async function afterToolCall(params: {
353:   toolName: string;
354:   toolInput: Record<string, unknown>;
355:   toolOutput?: string;
356:   error?: string;
357: }): Promise<void> {
358:   if (!config.toolCallCapture) return;
359:   if (!currentSession) return;
360: 
361:   const startTime = params.toolInput._agentlog_startTime as number || Date.now();
362:   const durationMs = Date.now() - startTime;
363: 
364:   const toolCall: ToolCall = {
365:     name: params.toolName,
366:     input: params.toolInput,
367:     output: params.error || params.toolOutput,
368:     durationMs,
369:     timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
370:   };
371: 
372:   currentSession.toolCalls.push(toolCall);
373: 
374:   // Create span via REST API
375:   await createSpan(currentSession.traceId, {
376:     role: "tool",
377:     content: JSON.stringify({ tool: params.toolName, input: params.toolInput, output: params.toolOutput }),
378:     tool_name: params.toolName,
379:     duration_ms: durationMs,
380:     timestamp: toolCall.timestamp,
381:   });
382: }
383: 
384: function extractReasoningFromMessages(
385:   messages: Array<{ role: string; content: string | Array<unknown> }>
386: ): void {
387:   if (!currentSession) return;
388: 
389:   for (const msg of messages) {
390:     if (msg.role !== "assistant") continue;
391: 
392:     if (typeof msg.content === "string") {
393:       const reasoning = extractReasoningFromText(msg.content);
394:       if (reasoning) {
395:         currentSession.reasoning.push(reasoning);
396:       }
397:       continue;
398:     }
399: 
400:     if (Array.isArray(msg.content)) {
401:       for (const block of msg.content) {
402:         if (typeof block !== "object" || block === null) continue;
403:         const b = block as Record<string, unknown>;
404: 
405:         if (b.type === "thinking" || b.type === "thought" || b.type === "reasoning") {
406:           const thinking =
407:             typeof b.thinking === "string"
408:               ? b.thinking
409:               : typeof b.content === "string"
410:               ? b.content
411:               : typeof b.text === "string"
412:               ? b.text
413:               : JSON.stringify(b);
414:           if (thinking) {
415:             currentSession.reasoning.push(thinking.slice(0, 4000));
416:           }
417:         }
418: 
419:         if (b.type === "text" && typeof b.text === "string") {
420:           const reasoning = extractReasoningFromText(b.text);
421:           if (reasoning) {
422:             currentSession.reasoning.push(reasoning);
423:           }
424:         }
425:       }
426:     }
427:   }
428: }
429: 
430: function extractReasoningFromText(text: string): string | null {
431:   const thinkingMatch = text.match(/<thinking>([\s\S]*?)<\/thinking>/i);
432:   if (thinkingMatch && thinkingMatch[1].trim()) {
433:     return thinkingMatch[1].trim().slice(0, 4000);
434:   }
435:   const reasoningMatch = text.match(/\[REASONING\]([\s\S]*?)\[\/REASONING\]/i);
436:   if (reasoningMatch && reasoningMatch[1].trim()) {
437:     return reasoningMatch[1].trim().slice(0, 4000);
438:   }
439:   return null;
440: }
441: 
442: async function tryBindCommit(): Promise<void> {
443:   if (!config.autoBindCommit || !currentSession) return;
444: 
445:   try {
446:     const { execSync } = await import("child_process");
447:     const commitHash = execSync("git rev-parse HEAD", {
448:       encoding: "utf-8",
449:       cwd: currentSession.workspacePath,
450:     }).trim();
451: 
452:     if (commitHash) {
453:       console.log(`[openclaw-agent-log] Bound session to commit ${commitHash.slice(0, 7)}`);
454:     }
455:   } catch {
456:     console.log("[openclaw-agent-log] No git commit to bind");
457:   }
458: }
459: 
460: export async function onAgentEnd(params: {
461:   messages: Array<{ role: string; content: string | Array<unknown> }>;
462:   usage?: { promptTokens?: number; completionTokens?: number };
463: }): Promise<void> {
464:   if (!currentSession) return;
465: 
466:   if (config.reasoningCapture) {
467:     extractReasoningFromMessages(params.messages);
468:   }
469: 
470:   await tryBindCommit();
471: 
472:   // Finalize trace via REST API (replaces log_intent)
473:   await finalizeTrace(
474:     currentSession.traceId,
475:     currentSession.taskGoal,
476:     currentSession.toolCalls.map((t) => String(t.input._agentlog_file || "")),
477:     currentSession.reasoning
478:   );
479: 
480:   console.log(`[openclaw-agent-log] Session ${currentSession.sessionId} finalized, trace ${currentSession.traceId} marked completed`);
481:   currentSession = null;
482: }
483: 
484: // ─────────────────────────────────────────────
485: // Trace Handoff Functions (from openclaw-agent)
486: // ─────────────────────────────────────────────
487: 
488: export async function checkAndClaimTrace(
489:   workspacePath: string,
490:   agentType: string
491: ): Promise<TraceHandoffResult> {
492:   try {
493:     const sessionsJsonPath = await getSessionsJsonPath(workspacePath);
494:     const sessions = readSessionsJson(sessionsJsonPath);
495: 
496:     for (const [traceId, entry] of Object.entries(sessions.pending)) {
497:       if (entry.worktree && entry.worktree !== workspacePath) {
498:         continue;
499:       }
500: 
501:       if (entry.targetAgent === agentType) {
502:         const sessionId = nanoid();
503:         const activeEntry: ActiveSessionEntry = {
504:           sessionId,
505:           traceId,
506:           agentType,
507:           status: "active",
508:           startedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
509:           worktree: workspacePath,
510:         };
511: 
512:         delete sessions.pending[traceId];
513:         sessions.active[sessionId] = activeEntry;
514:         writeSessionsJson(sessionsJsonPath, sessions);
515: 
516:         process.env.AGENTLOG_TRACE_ID = traceId;
517: 
518:         // Update trace status to in_progress
519:         await updateTraceStatus(traceId, "in_progress");
520: 
521:         console.log(`[openclaw-agent-log] Claimed trace: ${traceId} (agent: ${agentType})`);
522: 
523:         return { success: true, traceId, sessionId };
524:       }
525:     }
526: 
527:     return { success: false, error: "没有找到匹配的 pending trace" };
528:   } catch (err) {
529:     return { success: false, error: err instanceof Error ? err.message : String(err) };
530:   }
531: }
532: 
533: export function extractTraceIdFromMessage(message: string): string | null {
534:   const patterns = [
535:     /Trace[:\s]+([A-Z0-9]+)/i,
536:     /trace[-_]?id[:\s]+([A-Z0-9]+)/i,
537:     /\[([A-Z0-9]{26})\]/,
538:   ];
539: 
540:   for (const pattern of patterns) {
541:     const match = message.match(pattern);
542:     if (match) {
543:       return match[1];
544:     }
545:   }
546: 
547:   return null;
548: }
549: 
550: export async function queryPendingTraces(
551:   workspacePath: string,
552:   agentType?: string
553: ): Promise<TraceSearchResult[]> {
554:   try {
555:     const params = new URLSearchParams({ workspacePath });
556:     if (agentType) params.set("agentType", agentType);
557: 
558:     const response = await apiRequest<{
559:       success: boolean;
560:       data: Array<{ traceId: string; entry: PendingTraceEntry }>;
561:     }>("GET", `/api/traces/pending?${params.toString()}`);
562: 
563:     return response.data.map((item) => ({
564:       traceId: item.traceId,
565:       taskGoal: item.entry.taskGoal ?? "",
566:       targetAgent: item.entry.targetAgent,
567:       createdAt: item.entry.createdAt,
568:     }));
569:   } catch (err) {
570:     console.error(`[openclaw-agent-log] Query pending traces failed: ${err}`);
571:     return [];
572:   }
573: }
574: 
575: export async function claimTrace(
576:   traceId: string,
577:   agentType: string,
578:   workspacePath: string
579: ): Promise<TraceHandoffResult> {
580:   try {
581:     const sessionsJsonPath = await getSessionsJsonPath(workspacePath);
582:     const sessions = readSessionsJson(sessionsJsonPath);
583: 
584:     if (!sessions.pending[traceId]) {
585:       return { success: false, error: "Trace 不在 pending 状态" };
586:     }
587: 
588:     const sessionId = nanoid();
589:     const activeEntry: ActiveSessionEntry = {
590:       sessionId,
591:       traceId,
592:       agentType,
593:       status: "active",
594:       startedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
595:     };
596: 
597:     delete sessions.pending[traceId];
598:     sessions.active[sessionId] = activeEntry;
599:     writeSessionsJson(sessionsJsonPath, sessions);
600: 
601:     process.env.AGENTLOG_TRACE_ID = traceId;
602: 
603:     // Update trace status to in_progress
604:     await updateTraceStatus(traceId, "in_progress");
605: 
606:     // Also notify backend via API
607:     try {
608:       await apiRequest("POST", `/api/traces/${traceId}/resume`, {
609:         agentType,
610:         workspacePath,
611:       });
612:     } catch {
613:       // API call failure doesn't affect local state
614:     }
615: 
616:     console.log(`[openclaw-agent-log] Claimed trace: ${traceId} (agent: ${agentType})`);
617: 
618:     return { success: true, traceId, sessionId };
619:   } catch (err) {
620:     return { success: false, error: err instanceof Error ? err.message : String(err) };
621:   }
622: }
623: 
624: export async function getActiveSession(
625:   workspacePath: string
626: ): Promise<ActiveSessionEntry | null> {
627:   try {
628:     const sessionsJsonPath = await getSessionsJsonPath(workspacePath);
629:     const sessions = readSessionsJson(sessionsJsonPath);
630:     const activeEntries = Object.values(sessions.active);
631:     return activeEntries.length > 0 ? activeEntries[0] : null;
632:   } catch {
633:     return null;
634:   }
635: }
636: 
637: export async function completeActiveSession(workspacePath: string): Promise<boolean> {
638:   try {
639:     const sessionsJsonPath = await getSessionsJsonPath(workspacePath);
640:     const sessions = readSessionsJson(sessionsJsonPath);
641: 
642:     const activeEntries = Object.values(sessions.active);
643:     if (activeEntries.length === 0) {
644:       return false;
645:     }
646: 
647:     const sessionId = activeEntries[0].sessionId;
648:     const traceId = activeEntries[0].traceId;
649:     delete sessions.active[sessionId];
650:     writeSessionsJson(sessionsJsonPath, sessions);
651: 
652:     // Update trace status to completed
653:     if (traceId) {
654:       await updateTraceStatus(traceId, "completed");
655:     }
656: 
657:     console.log(`[openclaw-agent-log] Completed session: ${sessionId}`);
658:     return true;
659:   } catch {
660:     return false;
661:   }
662: }
663: 
664: // ─────────────────────────────────────────────
665: // Skill Metadata
666: // ─────────────────────────────────────────────
667: 
668: export const skillMetadata = {
669:   name: "openclaw-agent-log",
670:   description: "OpenClaw Agent 自动存证与 Trace 生命周期管理 - 使用 trace/span API",
671:   version: "2.0.0",
672:   functions: [
673:     {
674:       name: "checkAndClaimTrace",
675:       description: "启动时检查并认领 pending traces",
676:       parameters: {
677:         type: "object",
678:         properties: {
679:           workspacePath: { type: "string", description: "工作区路径" },
680:           agentType: { type: "string", description: "Agent 类型" },
681:         },
682:         required: ["workspacePath", "agentType"],
683:       },
684:     },
